meaning: n.电喇叭商标名,电喇叭,高音喇叭,高音气笛
examples: The result? (Spoiler alert klaxon). They fell in love, of course.
Thee result? (Spoiler alert klaxon). They fell in love, of course.
Elvis Costello and the Pixies canceled performances, as did the British dance band Klaxon and the Gorillaz Sound System.
The music adapts to the situation here, though the continually urgent klaxon in the background gets in the way.
